allow: Bash(sed -i 's#http://localhost:8000/index#http://localhost:8000/index/web#; s#const body = { text: pageData.content, url: pageData.url, title: pageData.title };#const body = pageData;#' background.js)

PowerShell(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; Get-Command python3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; $PSVersionTable.PSVersion)

Bash(.venv_x64/Scripts/python.exe -c "import lancedb, pyarrow, fastapi, onnxruntime; print\('lancedb', lancedb.__version__\); print\('pyarrow', pyarrow.__version__\); print\('fastapi', fastapi.__version__\); print\('onnxruntime', onnxruntime.__version__\)")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,State,OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize; Get-Process -Id \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,ProcessName,Path,StartTime)
Bash(curl -s -m 8 -X POST http://localhost:8000/query -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"text": "test query", "modality": "text"}' -w "\\nquery status: %{http_code}\\n")
